match.userMessage:
Anamorphic film still, SCARLETT in a casual linen shirt with a small microphone clipped to the collar, leaning against a large sun-bleached rock with her body angled slightly toward the sea, head turned three-quarters, lips parted mid-sentence, one hand resting on the rock and the other loosely holding the microphone, tide gently rising around the base of the rocks in the background, wet sand and shallow foam visible, soft ocean horizon line beyond, natural late-afternoon coastal light with warm directional sunlight catching the edges of the rocks and creating gentle highlights on the linen fabric, shallow depth of field with the mid-ground figure in crisp focus and background surf softly blurred, locked eye-level frame on anamorphic lens with subtle lens flare from the sun low over the water, bright natural daylight with clean directional shadows and warm golden highlights, high-key airy color palette dominated by pale rock tones, ocean blues, and soft linen beige, cinematic social-first editorial style with tactile realism and effortless cool mood.

  <reference-images>
    - Image 1 [CHARACTER REF]: SCARLETT - Match the real-world appearance of Sienna Blake exactly
    - Image 2 [LOCATION REF]: EXT. BONDI BEACH - ROCKS - Sun-bleached rocks with rising tide behind
    
    IMPORTANT: Reference images CARRY the visual identity of their labeled objects. When the prompt names an UPPERCASE element token, render it faithfully from its ELEMENT REF image — do not generate a new version from the prose. When the prompt names a LOCATION REF, use that image for the environment, lighting, and architectural identity. Prose describes how things are framed, lit, and positioned in the shot — it does not redefine what the reference already shows.
  </reference-images>
